AssociateChannel.description: Grants permission to associate a new Channel with a particular NotificationConfiguration

AssociateManagedNotificationAccountConta.description: Grants permission to associate an Account contact to a particular Managed Notification Configuration

AssociateManagedNotificationAdditionalCh.description: Grants permission to associate a Channel to a particular Managed Notification Configuration

AssociateOrganizationalUnit.description: Grants permission to associate an Organizational Unit to a particular Notification Configuration

CreateEventRule.description: Grants permission to create a new EventRule, associating it with a NotificationConfiguration

CreateNotificationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to create a NotificationConfiguration

DeleteEventRule.description: Grants permission to delete an EventRule

DeleteNotificationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to delete a NotificationConfiguration

DeregisterNotificationHub.description: Grants permission to deregister a NotificationHub

DisableNotificationsAccessForOrganizatio.description: Grants permission to disable Service Trust for AWS User Notifications

DisassociateChannel.description: Grants permission to remove a Channel from a NotificationConfiguration

DisassociateManagedNotificationAccountCo.description: Grants permission to remove an Account contact from a Managed Notification Configuration

DisassociateManagedNotificationAdditiona.description: Grants permission to remove a Channel from a Managed Notification Configuration

DisassociateOrganizationalUnit.description: Grants permission to disassociate an Organizational Unit to a particular Notification Configuration

EnableNotificationsAccessForOrganization.description: Grants permission to enable Service Trust for AWS User Notifications

GetEventRule.description: Grants permission to get an EventRule

GetFeatureOptInStatus.description: Grants permission to read the opt-in status of an AWS User Notification Service feature

GetManagedNotificationChildEvent.description: Grants permission to get a Managed Notification Child Event

GetManagedNotificationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to get a Managed Notification Configuration

GetManagedNotificationEvent.description: Grants permission to get a Managed NotificationEvent

GetNotificationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to get a NotificationConfiguration

GetNotificationEvent.description: Grants permission to get a NotificationEvent

GetNotificationsAccessForOrganization.description: Grants permission to read Service Trust for AWS User Notifications

ListChannels.description: Grants permission to list Channels by NotificationConfiguration

ListManagedNotificationChannelAssociatio.description: Grants permission to list Account contacts and Channels associated with a Managed Notification Configuration

ListManagedNotificationChildEvents.description: Grants permission to list Managed Notification Child Events

ListManagedNotificationConfigurations.description: Grants permission to list Managed Notification Configurations

ListManagedNotificationEvents.description: Grants permission to list Managed Notification Events

ListMemberAccounts.description: Grants permission to list Member Accounts for a Notification Configuration

ListOrganizationalUnits.description: Grants permission to list Organizational Units for a Notification Configuration

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to get tags for a resource

PutFeatureOptInStatus.description: Grants permission to update the opt-in status of an AWS User Notification Service feature

RegisterNotificationHub.description: Grants permission to register a NotificationHub

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a resource

UpdateEventRule.description: Grants permission to update an EventRule

UpdateNotificationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to update a NotificationConfiguration

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
